response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack development experience and a strong background in geospatial projects (e.g., GISCollective), which aligns with the routing/geospatial requirements. However, his expertise is heavily focused on languages like JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js, with limited demonstrated experience in modern C++ or Rust—the primary languages for the role. His geospatial work is notable but not explicitly tied to routing pipelines or high-performance distributed systems. The resume lacks direct evidence of pipeline optimization, latency reduction, or real-time traffic integration.
strengths: Proven expertise in full-stack development and distributed systems (re:cinq, Optilyz)
History of building scalable, event-driven platforms (GISCollective, Node.js/Dlang stack)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with modern C++/Rust for routing pipeline development
No clear evidence of working with navigation systems or routing data optimization
Mostly web/mobile-focused background, with less emphasis on low-latency, high-throughput systems
